name: Village Square
entryDialogue: Welcome to the Learning Village, Pip! The villagers need your help. Speak to Benny the Baker — he looks a little flustered!

objects.label: Benny the Baker
objects.dialogue: Oh thank goodness you're here! I've gone and mixed up all my bread deliveries! Can you help me sort them into the right baskets?

objects.label: Fountain
objects.dialogue: The fountain bubbles away cheerfully. Shell splashes a paw in the water!

objects.label: Notice Board
objects.dialogue: Welcome to Adventopia, Pip! Help the villagers, collect the 3 golden key pieces, and unlock the Town Gate to begin your adventure!

objects.label: Bench
objects.dialogue: Pip sits down for a moment. Shell climbs up and settles beside them.
